titleStmt.title: SII 24.272: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 272. (A.R. No. 377 of 1953-54.) V PRĀKĀRA, EAST WALL, NORTH END, OPPOSITE THE 1000-PILLARED MAṆḌAPA.

summary.p: Purports to be an order of the deity ratifying the proposals made in the 9th year of regin of Vira-Rāmanāthadēva by Echi-Bhaṭṭaṉ of Kauśika gōtra, the Kuḍinīr-sāvāsi of the palace (aṟaimaṉai) who, along with the other temple servants made a representation to the god in respect of the Lakshmīnārāyaṇapperumāḷ temple situated in Bhadrākara-chaturvēdimaṅgalam that (1) as a protective measure, a row of house sites all around the temple be given to deserving brāhmaṇas, (2) that some more lands from Guṇaśīla-chaturvēdimaṅgalam be acquired and endowed to the temple to augment its income from the existing endowments which was found to be inadequate for maintaining worship and offerings in it, for which purpose Ēchi-Bhaṭṭaṉ deposited 7500 kāśu in the temple treasury. Among the signatories of the document figures Pallavaṉ Viḻupparaiyaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīḥ . Etat surāsurādhīśa maulimālā vibhūṣaṇam . śrīmat śrīraṅgadhāmeśabhṛtyavarggasya śāsanam §
tevar Araimaṉai kuṭi nir cāvāci kauśikagotrattu Ecipaṭṭaṉukku vaṭakarai rājarāja vaḷanāṭṭu tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam
tirunāmattukkāṇi kuṇacilamaṅkalattu tāṉ kaṉṉāka Ü tituṇākattuThe writing is clear but it does not convey any sense.kācu Oṭukki mahāniyogam Eḻuti vilai koṇṭa
puṉcey nilattu vaitta Akaram bhadrākaraccaturvvedimaṅkalattu melaruku Ukantaruḷi vitta nāyaṉār lakṣmīnārāyaṇap
perumāḷ koyilaic cūḻa veḷiyāyc cemamiṉṟiye Irukkaiyāle Iṅkut taikku rakṣaiyākavum Iṉṉāyaṉārai
sevittirukkavum Ittirumuṟṟattaic cūḻa Orucciṟakan tiruvitiyākak kaṇṭu Itile yogyarāy taruvalai
yuṭaiyarāyirukkum brāhmaṇarai vaittup paḻaiya Akarattuṭaṉe kūṭṭuvatāka Ivviṭattile ciṟutu puṉcey nilam
Iṉṉāyaṉār tiruvārātanattukku Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭikku śeṣamāka nāṉ ci paṇṭārattu kācu Oṭukki vilai koṇṭu
kuṭutta nilattu karāvaśiṣṭattāl tiruvārātaṉam kuṟaiyaṟa naṭattap porukiṟa tillaiyeṉṟum Itukkuṭalāka muṉpu tanta
nilattaruke Utsāham paṇṇi Ākkikkoḷḷa Oru pū Oṭṭāyiruppatu Iṉṉamum ciṟutu nilamum Iṉnilaṅkaḷ payiṟcey
veḷḷāḷar kuṭi Irukka Ikkuṇacilamaṅkalattu nattattile ciṟutu maṉaiyum vilaiyākattaravum viḷainilattu Oṭṭuppaṭi nel
lile tiruvārātaṉa śeṣamāka muṉpu tanta nelluṭaṉe Iṉnilattileyum ciṟutu nellu tantu Ivai yiṟṟukku cipaṇṭāratte
kācu Oṭukkivittuk koḷḷavum veṇumeṉṟu tāṉ collukaiyāle Ippaṭikaḷ śrīvīrarāmanāthadevarkku Oṉpatāvatu
mācimāsattu tiruuttirattukku perumāḷum nāccimārum puṟappaṭṭaruḷi nalan tikaḻnārāyaṇan tirumaṇṭapattu tirumalai tantāṉ
tiru muttup pantal kiḻ veta neṟi kāṭṭiṉāṉ siṅhāsanattu Eḻuntaruḷi Irukka jiyarum nāṅkaḷum tiruppaṇi ceyyum nampimārum
viṇṇappañ ceyya tiruvuḷḷamāy Ippaṭikaḷile ceytu kuṭuttu Ivaiyiṟṟukku Uṅkaḷ Eḻuttiṭṭa Olaiyum kuṭuṅkoḷeṉṟu
tiruvāymoḻintaruḷukaiyil Ittirumuṟṟattaic cūḻa Ēṟṟukiṟa Akarattukku veṇṭum puñcey kuḻi nāṉūṟṟu Aim
patukku Ippaṭi koliṉa vāstuvukku Uḷḷatāy Uttamarutāṉa tirunantavaṉattu kaippaṭṭa nilamāy Itukku
nilattukku nilamāka Ivvūr vaṭavellai putuppaiṅkeṇikkaraiyil śrīraṅga nārāyaṇaṉ vayakkal Eṉṟu
per kūvappaṭṭa nilattu kiḻtalai tiṭalil tirunantavaṉamāka viṭṭu parivaṟtaṉaiyāl tirunāmattukkāṇi
Āṉa puṉceynilam kuḻi Irunūṟṟut toṇṇūṟum Itan teṟku muṭṭattic ceyyil tiṭal tiruttāṉa
viḷainilam Uḷpaṭa kuḻi nūṟṟaṟupatum Ākak kuḻi nāṉūṟṟu Aimpatil Ivvakarattu nattattukku muṉpu Eḻutik
kuṭutta niyogappaṭi kuḻi Āyirattil Ittirumuṟṟattukkuṭalāka nikkiṉa kuḻi nūṟṟeṭṭu nikki kuḻi muṉṉūṟṟu nāṟ
pattiraṇṭum Iṉṉāyaṉāṟkut tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka muṉpu viṟṟa viḷainilam puṟṟaṉ ceykku kiḻakku Āḻivallavaṉ
Oru pū nilam nālumāvum Itaṉ vaṭakku teṅkañ ceyyilum Aḻiñcil tuvai yilum teṟkaṭaiya Oru pū nilam
Iraṇṭu māvum Āka Oru pū nilam Āṟumāvum Ikkuṇacilamaṅkalattu Ūr nattattu melait teruvu mel ciṟakil
vaṭatalaiyil vaṭakkil teruvil nermeṟku nokkip pokiṟa Oḻukkaikku teṟku kuḻi nāṟpattañcaraiyum Āka puṉcey
kuḻi 3 100 8 10 7(1/2) ṉāl nilam nya Ë ¿m viḷainilam (1/4) pam Āka nilam (1/4) 4pa Ë ¿ Iṉnilam Oṉpatumā mukkāṇi Araik
kāṇiyum Inta lakṣmīnārāyaṇap perumāḷukku tirunāmattukkāṇiyum Akarapaṭṭar kaḷukku maṉaiyumāvatākavum
Iṉnilattu puṉceyyāṉa nilam nattamākkukaiyāle puṉceyk kaṭamai tavirntu Itil brāhmaṇar kuṭi Iruppāṉ
maṉaikku Āṭṭaikku tiruvaraṅka tevaṉāl nāḻi Urit tiruviḷakku ney ci paṇṭārat taḷakkavum viḷai nilattukku Ivvūril
Ikkaṇṭattu Orupū Oṭṭuppaṭi veli Oṉṟukku nūṟṟukkalamāka nellu muppatiṉ kalattil Iṉnāyaṉāṟku tiruvārātaṉa
śeṣamāka jiyarum nāṅkaḷum niścayittu nikkiṉa nellu pa 1
tirukkoṭṭākārattile Aḷakkavum Iṉnilattāl varum tiṟappuk kaṭamai vaṟkam tiṟappil pūṇṭapaṭiye I ma va
nilattukkum puṉceykkum kāṇivilaikkum tiruvārātaṉattukku nikkiṉa nellukku Ubhaya mākavum Ittirumuṟṟattukku vāstuvukku
Uḷpaṭṭa puṉceyt tiruttu viḷainilam kuḻi nūṟṟirupatukkut talai māṟu śrī raṅga nārāyaṇaṉ vayakkal vaṭatalaiyil Uḷkiṭai
Āṉa tiṭalum tirutti centāmaraikkaṇṇaṉ vayakkal vaṭatalaiyil nīrnilaiyāṉa Iṭamum tūrttu koḷḷa tiruttuk kūlikkum
niścayitta kācu Ēḻāyirattu Aiññūṟum tirukkoṭṭākārattu Oṭukki taravu koṇṭu Iṉnilam Oṉpatumā mukkāṇi Araik
kāṇiyum Ippaṭi svam Āṉapaṭikkum Iṉnilaṅkaḷukku Ippaṭi Iṟuppatāṉa paṭikkum kalveṭṭik koḷḷak kaṭavatākavum
jiyarum nāṅkaḷum tiruppaṇi ceyyum nampimārum kūṭi niścayittu tantom Ivai kaikkoṇṭu Anubhavittu Ippaṭi ceyyap
paṇṇuka .§ paṇiyāl Ivai koyil kaṇakku pallavaṉ viḻupparaiyaṉ Eḻuttu .§ Ippaṭikku Ivai cirāma nampi Eḻuttu Ivai
śrī vaikuntadāsaṉeḻuttu tirukkārkkaraidāsaṉeḻuttu tirumaṇaṟtūṇnampi Eḻuttu maruṅkūrp piḷḷai Eḻuttu
vaṇṭuvarāpatinampi Eḻuttu Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷavaḷḷaneḻuttu Uttamanampi Eḻuttu vaṇṭu varāpati nampieḻuttu
tiruccolaippittaṉeḻuttu śrīraṅganārāyaṇa dāssya .§
Digital edition of SII 24.272 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
